title: Dropdown and Label Templates Automatic Updates
excerpt: It would be awesome if we could automatically update dropdown or label templates, or really any kind of template, without having to create a new template and readding it to the boards that use those templates currently. …

posts.author: jpomp (Jackie Pomposelli)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be awesome if we could automatically update dropdown or label templates, or really any kind of template, without having to create a new template and readding it to the boards that use those templates currently. That’s a lot of manual work, when you could just edit a template and have it automatically be applied to all the columns that currently use that template.
